title: Cisco IOS-XE — BGP with route-map and prefix-list

source.description: Dual-homed BGP edge router with route-map for local-pref manipulation and prefix-list for outbound filtering

config.description: Dual-homed BGP with two upstream ISPs, prefix-list outbound filtering, and route-map for local-preference

expected_translation.high_level: Huawei VRP equivalent with bgp [asn], peer, ip ip-prefix, and route-policy

verification.notes: clean deployable — BGP (Cisco→Huawei) mapping well-known: neighbor→peer, route-map→route-policy, prefix-list→ip-prefix. Route_policy feature alone does not force deployable=false (criterion: only actual risk signals). Expected output is clean Huawei VRP syntax with no Cisco residue.
